import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import timm
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

class BackboneHead(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, backbone_name, num_classes):
        super().__init__()
        self.backbone = timm.create_model(backbone_name, pretrained=True, num_classes=0)
        # Get feature dimension
        num_features = self.backbone.num_features
        self.head = nn.Linear(num_features, num_classes)
    
    def forward(self, x):
        features = self.backbone(x)
        logits = self.head(features)
        return logits

def create_model(num_classes, backbone='vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai'):
    """
    Create a classification model with specified backbone.
    Supported backbones:
    - vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai
    - vit_base_patch16_224.augreg_in1k
    - vit_base_patch14_dinov2.lvd142m
    - resnet50
    """
    model = BackboneHead(backbone_name=backbone, num_classes=num_classes)
    return model
